resources.string: See your active roadmap, progress, and learning streak.
Sign in to see your active roadmap and progress.
Choose a learning path and track your progress here.
Your next learning step is ready.
- The platform helps you master any programming topics. 🚀
Sign in to save your roadmap, progress, and daily streak.
Join rmap to build and track your learning journey.
By continuing, you agree to our
Unable to sign in. Please try again.
Sign in to generate your personalized roadmap.
Sign in to start learning and track your progress.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
Sign in to access learning resources.
Generate a roadmap based on your goal, current skills, and timeline.
You don\'t have an active roadmap yet. Search a skill, choose a role, or create one with AI.
Not sure which path fits you?
Answer a few questions and RMap will suggest your first roadmap.
Perfect starting points for your journey
Find roadmap domains based on your current path
Tell RMap your goal, timeline, and learning pace. Then answer a few follow-up questions so the roadmap can fit your context.
Set the goal, deadline, and daily pace. RMap will ask a few follow-up questions next.
Search generated roadmaps, continue learning, or create a new plan from your current goal.
Personalized plans created from your goals, deadlines, and learning pace.
Create your first personalized roadmap from your topic, deadline, and learning pace.
Try a different keyword, create a new AI roadmap, or explore ready-made learning paths.
Type a skill, role, or topic you want to focus on.
What can I help you learn?
Enter a topic below to generate a personalized roadmap for it.
Pick when this goal should feel achievable.
Choose a pace you can repeat on most days.
This can take around one to two minutes. You can explore the app while RMap keeps the generation running in the background.
RMap is turning your answers into a personalized learning path.
You can explore the app while generation continues in the background. RMap will keep preparing your roadmap and notify you when it is ready.
These details guide how the roadmap is paced and prioritized.
%1$d answers help RMap tune your starting level and practice focus.
This will stop creating your personalized roadmap. Your goal and assessments will be kept so you can start again later.
Allow notifications so you can track roadmap generation from the notification shade while using other apps.
Enter a roadmap goal with at least 10 characters.
Unable to prepare personalized questions. Please try again.
Write your own answer before continuing.
Roadmap generation failed. Please try again later.
Progress updates while RMap creates your AI roadmap.
Your %1$s roadmap is ready to view.
RMap could not finish your %1$s roadmap. Please try again later or explore available roadmaps meanwhile.
No categories match “%1$s”. Try another keyword or clear the search.
Roadmaps you have started and can continue.
All roadmaps in your learning library.
View achieved skills in %1$s. %2$d of %3$d skills achieved.
Complete roadmap skills to build your achievement collection.
No completed skills are available in this category yet.
Unable to load completed skills. Please try again.
Create a personalized roadmap or explore ready-made paths.
No roadmaps match “%1$s”. Try another keyword or clear the search.
Couldn’t refresh your roadmaps. Showing saved data.
What do you want to learn today?
Choose a domain to narrow the library
Available template learning roadmaps in RMap
No roadmaps match the current filters.
Control the profile details shown across your RMap workspace.
Choose a pre-designed avatar for your profile.
Keep your name and public identity up to date.
Full name must be at least 2 characters.
Full name must be 100 characters or fewer.
Change your password and sign out of active RMap sessions.
Use at least 8 characters. You will sign in again after the change.
New password must be at least 8 characters.
Password changed. Please sign in again.
Unable to load this roadmap. Please try again.
This roadmap does not have any skill nodes to show.
Unable to save progress. You can keep learning and try again later.
Local search: Chapters, Skill Lessons, Milestones in this roadmap.
Ready when you want to begin this node
Apply HTML, CSS, and JavaScript basics in a portfolio-ready project.
Based on your progress in \"%1$s\", we recommend focusing on
Unable to load this skill. Please try again.
No skill details are available yet.
Review the resources below, then take the quiz when you are ready.
No description is available for this skill yet.
No resources are attached to this node yet.
Complete the quiz first to mark this skill completed.
Complete previous required skills to start this node.
Continue the current node to unlock this quiz.
This quiz is available after the roadmap starts. Start learning now and continue to the quiz?
This node is completed. Your roadmap progress has been updated.
Quiz is available when this node is in progress.
Unable to load this learning node. Please try again.
Unable to load this milestone. Please try again.
Unable to submit this milestone. Please try again.
Submission received. Test execution is starting.
No project brief is available for this milestone yet.
The test suite is being prepared. Try again in a moment.
Test execution hit a server-side error.
Enter a valid GitHub repository URL.
Complete previous required skills to start this milestone.
You passed this node. Your roadmap progress will update automatically.
This node remains in progress. Review the resources and try the quiz again when you are ready.
Your streak and roadmap progress can update from this completion.
Keep this node active and revisit the lesson resources.
Check what was correct before leaving the quiz.
Unable to load this quiz. Please try again.
Remind me to continue my roadmap.
Use streak-aware reminder copy when I am building momentum.
Notify me when an AI roadmap is ready or fails.
Enter a valid time from 00:00 to 23:59.
Turn on notification permission so RMap can remind you to learn and keep your streak.
Please allow notifications to enable learning reminders.
Allow alarms and reminders so RMap can notify you close to the reminder time you choose.
Cheerful reminders to learn and protect your streak.
You are on a %1$d-day streak. Open RMap for a quick lesson and keep the momentum bright.
Your %1$s roadmap has a next step waiting. Open RMap for a focused lesson.
%1$d-day streak marked. Small steps, real progress.
Your %1$d-day streak is already marked for today. Come back for a focused lesson.

string-array.name: notification_learning_bodies
string-array.item: A short learning session is enough to build momentum. Open RMap and complete a focused step.
Your future developer self will thank you. Learn a little and keep your streak alive.
Five focused minutes can move your roadmap forward. Let\'s keep the streak warm.
Pick up where you left off and turn today into another active learning day.

string-array.name: notification_no_roadmap_bodies
string-array.item: Explore beginner-friendly roadmaps and pick one that matches your next developer goal.
A clear path makes learning easier. Open RMap and start your first roadmap today.
Not sure what to learn next? Browse roadmaps and choose a path you can begin in minutes.
Set a learning direction today so tomorrow\'s progress has somewhere to land.

resources.string: Connect external accounts used for sign-in and future roadmap validation.
Create an account to save your learning roadmap, progress, and daily streak.
Log in to track your learning days, keep streaks alive, and view your weekly progress.
